div.p:
We're a collaborative community website that covers the multimedia project BanG Dream! We invite you to join our community and help us make this wiki even better. We are striving to turn this place into a reliable source of information for the franchise. Help us by creating or editing any of our articles!
We hope you find the wiki helpful.
